name: press-like
title: Press Like
description: Instagram-canon heart-bounce like button. Press scales the heart 1.32×, flips to red (#ED4956), and settles with a spring overshoot — the bounce is what makes the interaction feel real. Supports controlled + uncontrolled state, three sizes (compact / default / large), optional count display (short '1.2K / 12.4K / 1.2M' or full localized), custom colors. Used inside YoutubePlayer's like button + ReelsFeed action rail. Reduced-motion users skip the scale-burst — the color flip is the state confirmation.
